Dinks and Drives located in Suntree is a Pickleball/Golf Simulator Indoor Facility with Black Light capabilities for Pickleball players to participate. We have a brand new A/C controlled 4500 Sq. Ft. Facility with 6 large screen TV’s and ample room to lounge and catch up with fellow Pickleballers.
Memberships are available with 24hr access. Open for public play Monday-Friday 9-5.
